specialty.1: Cosmetic aura visual only (no gameplay effect).
specialty.3: Reduces your units' attack BY {p1} percent.
specialty.39: Deals {p2} percent damage TO your units matching the expression (by race / gender / class).
specialty.4: ATK rises as its own HP falls: x2 below 51% HP, x3 below 41%, x4 below 31%, x5 below 21%, x6 below 11% (x7 below 1%, unverified).
specialty.6: Takes half damage from ranged attacks (magic fencer).
specialty.9: Does not stop moving to attack (attacks while walking).
specialty.10: Protected: immune to attacks while its paired influence-11 partner is alive, and dies/vanishes when that partner dies or leaves. With no influence-11 partner present, it behaves as a normal enemy.
specialty.11: Guardian: keeps its paired influence-10 partner immune while alive; the 10 dies/vanishes once this 11 dies or leaves.
specialty.15: Invisible and untargetable flag (likely a special/marker enemy).
specialty.44: Linked HP: takes damage whenever its linked unit (an influence-45 marker) takes damage.
specialty.45: Link target marker: an influence-44 enemy takes damage whenever THIS unit is damaged (the partner the 44 is linked to).
specialty.55: Its hits cancel/prevent the struck unit's skill (on-hit skill seal).
specialty.47: Cannot be damaged until its paired marker (influence 48) leaves.
specialty.48: Marker for an influence-47 enemy (its presence keeps 47 invulnerable).
specialty.58: Its hits apply a water-torture DoT to your unit (fixed damage over time).
specialty.49: Cosmetic visual effect only (no gameplay effect).
specialty.50: Cosmetic visual effect only (no gameplay effect).
specialty.25: Your units take {p1} percent of normal damage while near it.
specialty.41: Negates incoming damage below a threshold (a barrier). _Expression sets who it protects: IsOwnerUnit() = itself only, !IsOwnerUnit() = nearby allies within its aura (id 18 radius). _ExtParam lists the negate threshold per damage type (近接/遠隔 = melee/ranged, 物理/魔法/貫通 = phys/magic/true).
specialty.2: Its attacks can paralyze (potency {p2}; the higher the value, the fewer hits needed).
specialty.7: Attacks {p1} times in a row, with a {p2}-frame gap between hits.
specialty.8: [[?p1|Hits {p1} targets at once.|Hits all targets in range at once.]]
specialty.14: When it dies it self-destructs, dealing {p3} percent of its ATK to everything within {p2} range.
specialty.17: Heals itself {p2} HP every {p3} frames[[?p4: for {p4} frames, then stops]].
specialty.20: Lowers your units' attack to {p1} percent of normal.
specialty.21: Lowers your units' defense to {p1} percent of normal.
specialty.22: Lowers your units' magic resistance to {p1} percent of normal.
specialty.5: Deals more damage the lower its own HP is (up to {p2} percent at low HP).
specialty.28: Has a {p1} percent chance to evade melee physical attacks.
specialty.29: Has a {p1} percent chance to evade ranged physical attacks.
specialty.32: Heals all enemies {p2} HP every {p3} frames.
specialty.34: Deals {p1} percent of normal final damage (also boosts its damage-over-time).
specialty.40: Raises the attack and defense of nearby enemies (this one stacks).
specialty.42: Covers the map in a weather effect while it is alive.
specialty.43: Forces your ranged units to target it (taunt).
specialty.46: Its hits apply a damage-over-time effect to your unit.
specialty.57: Each hit of its attack uses a different damage type (see the per-hit list below).
specialty.59: Its hits lower your unit's attack, defense, and magic resistance for a while.
specialty.62: Heals itself for {p1} percent of its HP each time it lands a hit.
specialty.23: Counters by reflecting damage back at whoever attacks it.
specialty.51: Attacks {p1} times per attack (multi-hit), {p2} frames apart.
specialty.52: Healing / recovery effect (heals {p1} by amount; _Expression sets the target).
specialty.53: Resists slow and time-stop by {p2} percent.
specialty.16: Slowly loses its own HP over time.
specialty.35: Raises the attack of nearby enemies[[?p2: by +{p2} (flat)]][[?p2|| by {p1} percent]] (does not stack with itself).
specialty.18: Radius of this enemy's aura (the area its aura effect, e.g. the DoT in id 19, covers). Not damage by itself.
specialty.19: Damages allied units standing inside its aura (id 18 sets the radius) over time.
specialty.31: Cosmetic hit effect only (no gameplay effect).
specialty.36: Raises the defense of nearby enemies[[?p2: by +{p2} (flat)]][[?p2|| to {p1} percent]] (does not stack with itself).
specialty.64: [[?p1|Reduces the damage it takes to {p1} percent of normal.|Caps the damage it takes at {p3} per hit.]]

term.11: Raises the DEF of enemies matching the expression by {p1} percent.
term.8: Allied units lose HP periodically: {p2} HP every {p3} frames.
term.9: Allied units start the stage with {p1} percent less HP.
term.12: Enemy movement speed is {p1} percent of normal.
term.15: Enemy size is {p1} percent of normal.
term.16: Allied unit size is {p1} percent of normal.
term.19: Enemy attack range is {p1} percent of normal.
term.20: Enemy HP is {p1} percent of normal.
term.21: Enemy magic resistance is {p1} percent of normal.
term.22: Allied magic damage is {p1} percent of normal.
term.25: Allied unit cost is {p1} percent of normal (for units matching the expression).
term.18: Raises the ATK of enemies matching the expression by {p1} percent.
term.24: Restricts your team composition (IsOverlapMember()!=1 = no duplicate units).
term.26: Makai debuff: your units' ATK becomes {p1} percent of normal (50 = halved).
term.27: Makai debuff: your units' DEF becomes {p1} percent of normal (50 = halved).
term.30: Makai debuff: your cost/UP natural regen becomes {p1} percent of normal.
term.17: No cost generation (your cost/UP does not regenerate over time).
term.34: Deep-sea hazard: drains all units' HP and increases attack delay (_ExtParam: 攻撃待ち増加, ダメージ開始待ち).
term.48: Wide-area map: all enemies' and your units' attack range becomes {p1} percent of normal.
term.13: Raises the attack of your units matching the condition to {p1} percent.
term.14: Raises the defense of your units matching the condition to {p1} percent.
